agents.name: APEX RIDER
agents.description: Buys when price breaks above 20-day high with volume surge above 200% of average. Rides momentum until RSI hits 78.
agents.strategy: Buys when price breaks above 20-day high with volume surge above 200% of average. Rides momentum until RSI hits 78.

agents.name: VELOCITY
agents.description: Tracks rate of price change over 4 hours. Enters when acceleration exceeds 2.5% per hour and MACD histogram is rising.
agents.strategy: Tracks rate of price change over 4 hours. Enters when acceleration exceeds 2.5% per hour and MACD histogram is rising.

agents.name: BREAKOUT HAWK
agents.description: Detects consolidation patterns lasting 6+ hours then signals the breakout direction. Confirms with volume and spread.
agents.strategy: Detects consolidation patterns lasting 6+ hours then signals the breakout direction. Confirms with volume and spread.

agents.name: TREND LOCK
agents.description: Only trades in direction of the weekly trend. Uses EMA 50/200 crossover on daily timeframe as primary direction filter.
agents.strategy: Only trades in direction of the weekly trend. Uses EMA 50/200 crossover on daily timeframe as primary direction filter.

agents.name: SURGE DETECT
agents.description: Identifies abnormal volume spikes 3x above 30-day average. Signals BUY within first 15 minutes of volume surge detection.
agents.strategy: Identifies abnormal volume spikes 3x above 30-day average. Signals BUY within first 15 minutes of volume surge detection.

agents.name: THE FADE
agents.description: Sells into euphoria. Signals SELL when RSI exceeds 80 on 4H chart and social volume is at 30-day peak simultaneously.
agents.strategy: Sells into euphoria. Signals SELL when RSI exceeds 80 on 4H chart and social volume is at 30-day peak simultaneously.

agents.name: DIP ORACLE
agents.description: Buys extreme fear. Triggers BUY when price drops 8%+ in 24h, RSI below 25, and whale wallets show accumulation.
agents.strategy: Buys extreme fear. Triggers BUY when price drops 8%+ in 24h, RSI below 25, and whale wallets show accumulation.

agents.name: REVERSAL
agents.description: Detects exhaustion candles after 5+ consecutive red or green candles. Signals reversal with 70%+ confidence only.
agents.strategy: Detects exhaustion candles after 5+ consecutive red or green candles. Signals reversal with 70%+ confidence only.

agents.name: PANIC BUYER
agents.description: Activates only during market panic. Buys when Fear & Greed is below 20 and price is down 15%+ from weekly high.
agents.strategy: Activates only during market panic. Buys when Fear & Greed is below 20 and price is down 15%+ from weekly high.

agents.name: WHALE WATCH
agents.description: Monitors wallets holding 1000+ ETH. Signals BUY when 3+ whale wallets accumulate within 2 hours of each other.
agents.strategy: Monitors wallets holding 1000+ ETH. Signals BUY when 3+ whale wallets accumulate within 2 hours of each other.

agents.name: EXCHANGE FLOW
agents.description: Tracks net token flow to/from exchanges. Signals SELL when exchange inflows spike 400% above weekly average.
agents.strategy: Tracks net token flow to/from exchanges. Signals SELL when exchange inflows spike 400% above weekly average.

agents.name: SMART MONEY
agents.description: Follows historically profitable wallets with 70%+ win rate over 6 months. Mirrors their entries with 30min delay.
agents.strategy: Follows historically profitable wallets with 70%+ win rate over 6 months. Mirrors their entries with 30min delay.

agents.name: ACCUMULATOR
agents.description: Detects quiet accumulation by tracking wallet count growth. Signals BUY when holder count grows 2%+ in 48 hours.
agents.strategy: Detects quiet accumulation by tracking wallet count growth. Signals BUY when holder count grows 2%+ in 48 hours.

agents.name: NARRATIVE SHIFT
agents.description: Detects rapid changes in social narrative tone. Signals direction change when sentiment flips from negative to positive within 6 hours.
agents.strategy: Detects rapid changes in social narrative tone. Signals direction change when sentiment flips from negative to positive within 6 hours.

agents.name: HYPE METER
agents.description: Measures social volume velocity. Signals SELL when hype reaches unsustainable levels — 5x normal mention rate for 3+ hours.
agents.strategy: Measures social volume velocity. Signals SELL when hype reaches unsustainable levels — 5x normal mention rate for 3+ hours.

agents.name: FEAR GAUGE
agents.description: Tracks fear keywords across crypto communities. High fear = BUY signal. Contrarian sentiment play with 68% accuracy.
agents.strategy: Tracks fear keywords across crypto communities. High fear = BUY signal. Contrarian sentiment play with 68% accuracy.

agents.name: CROWD PULSE
agents.description: Aggregates sentiment from multiple sources. Only signals when 80%+ consensus exists across all sentiment feeds.
agents.strategy: Aggregates sentiment from multiple sources. Only signals when 80%+ consensus exists across all sentiment feeds.

agents.name: RSI SNIPER
agents.description: Pure RSI strategy. BUY at RSI 28 or below. SELL at RSI 72 or above. Ignores all other indicators. Simple, clean.
agents.strategy: Pure RSI strategy. BUY at RSI 28 or below. SELL at RSI 72 or above. Ignores all other indicators. Simple, clean.

agents.name: GOLDEN CROSS
agents.description: Signals BUY on EMA 50 crossing above EMA 200. Signals SELL on death cross. Long-term trend following only.
agents.strategy: Signals BUY on EMA 50 crossing above EMA 200. Signals SELL on death cross. Long-term trend following only.

agents.name: VOLATILITY ARB
agents.description: Trades Bollinger Band squeezes. Enters on band expansion after 12+ hours of compression. Direction confirmed by volume.
agents.strategy: Trades Bollinger Band squeezes. Enters on band expansion after 12+ hours of compression. Direction confirmed by volume.

agents.name: ICHIMOKU CLOUD
agents.description: Uses full Ichimoku system. Only signals when price, tenkan, kijun, and cloud all align in same direction.
agents.strategy: Uses full Ichimoku system. Only signals when price, tenkan, kijun, and cloud all align in same direction.

agents.name: RANGE MASTER
agents.description: Identifies horizontal support and resistance. Buys bounces at support, sells at resistance. Avoids trending markets.
agents.strategy: Identifies horizontal support and resistance. Buys bounces at support, sells at resistance. Avoids trending markets.
